aid: No, I did not use any aid
attention: No, I was able to concentrate
comments: I don't know if you did it on purpose but some of the objects were a bit hard to recognize. I remember one in particular, it was square-ish and at least one time it came up yellow/gold, was it supposed to be a microchip? Because my brain kept seeing it as a skateboard. Also I had some problems with all the different kinds of fruits, but that's probably a personal problem because I pretty much only eat apples and bananas. Last thing, I believe the experiment said "bigger in real life" but then an unicorn came up, so I don't know if that was a test because unicorns aren't real or if I was just supposed to see them as horse-sized.
